name: CheckCle
description: CheckCle — open-source full-stack monitoring (uptime HTTP/DNS/Ping/TCP, server CPU/RAM/disk, SSL/domain expiry, incidents, status pages). Imports CheckCle's monitored services / servers / SSL certificates into XORCISM Asset Monitoring (MONITORINGCHECK) and its incidents (MONITORINGINCIDENT). Tool: https://github.com/operacle/checkcle. Parses an exported JSON, or pulls live from CheckCle's PocketBase API — CHECKCLE_URL + CHECKCLE_TOKEN, or CHECKCLE_USER + CHECKCLE_PASSWORD (PocketBase auth).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline: a CheckCle JSON export — {services,servers,ssl,incidents}, a PocketBase {items:[…]} page, or a flat list of records (type auto-detected).

parameters.name: base
parameters.help: CheckCle base URL (PocketBase, e.g. http://host:8090). Overrides CHECKCLE_URL. Live mode needs CHECKCLE_TOKEN or CHECKCLE_USER + CHECKCLE_PASSWORD.

parameters.name: max_items
parameters.help: Maximum records to import per collection.
